Q=function(...)return x(v,{...},S,W)end return Q end,function(v,S)local W=f(S)local Q=function(Q,R)return x(v,{Q,R},S,W)end return Q end,function(v,S)local W=f(S)local Q=function(Q,R,k)return x(v,{Q;R,k},S,W)end return Q end return(z(9693135-874522,{}))(W(i))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[S(-954918-(-983753))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
